<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;1,700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>

.cm26{
  --b:#005BAC;--bd:#003D7A;--bl:#E6F2FB;--bxl:#F0F7FF;
  --ac:#00A3E0;
  --g1:#F5F7FA;--g2:#E8ECF2;--g4:#8E9BB0;--g7:#2E3A4E;--g9:#0D1826;
  --rn:#09152A;--rc:#0E1C34;--rb:#14243E;--rs:#1A2E4E;
  --f:'Outfit',sans-serif;--fs:'Playfair Display',serif;
  --ez:cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
  --focus-ring:0 0 0 3px rgba(0,91,172,.45);
  font-family:var(--f);color:var(--g9);overflow-x:hidden;
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;-moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;
  touch-action:manipulation;
}
.cm26 *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
.cm26 a{text-decoration:none}

.cm26 a:focus-visible,
.cm26 button:focus-visible,
.cm26 input:focus-visible,
.cm26 select:focus-visible,
.cm26 textarea:focus-visible{
  outline:2px solid var(--b);
  outline-offset:3px;
  border-radius:4px;
}

@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
  .cm26 *,.cm26 *::before,.cm26 *::after{
    animation-duration:.01ms!important;
    animation-iteration-count:1!important;
    transition-duration:.01ms!important;
  }
  .cm26-bimg{animation:none!important}
  .cm26-br{animation:none!important;opacity:.25}
  html{scroll-behavior:auto!important}
}

html{scroll-behavior:smooth}

.cm26-prog{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:3px;width:0%;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,#005BAC,#00A3E0);
  z-index:9999;pointer-events:none;
  transition:width .1s linear;
  will-change:width;
}

@media(pointer:fine){
  .cm26-cur{
    position:fixed;width:10px;height:10px;
    background:#005BAC;border-radius:50%;
    pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;
    transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    transition:transform .15s var(--ez);
    will-change:left,top;
  }
  .cm26-cring{
    position:fixed;width:32px;height:32px;
    border:1.5px solid rgba(0,91,172,.35);border-radius:50%;
    pointer-events:none;z-index:9997;
    transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    will-change:left,top;
  }
}

.cm26-hero{
  min-height:100svh;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.cm26-hero-banner-bg{
  position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;
  background:url('https://www.conceptmedical.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/europcr2026-team-booth.webp') center 30% / cover no-repeat;
}
.cm26-hero-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;
  background:linear-gradient(
    108deg,
    rgba(0,15,38,.96) 0%,
    rgba(0,25,55,.90) 32%,
    rgba(0,35,72,.66) 58%,
    rgba(0,0,0,.0) 80%
  );
}
.cm26-hero-overlay::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.018) 1px,transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.018) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:54px 54px;pointer-events:none;
}

.cm26-hinner{
  position:relative;z-index:2;
  max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;width:100%;
  padding:130px 3rem 0;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:3fr 1fr;
  gap:0;align-items:center;flex:1;
}
.cm26-hcontent-left{color:white}

.cm26-eyebrow{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);
  border-radius:100px;padding:6px 18px;
  font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:#fff;margin-bottom:22px;
  animation:cm26Up .8s var(--ez) both;
}
.cm26-pdot{
  width:7px;height:7px;
  background:#7DD3FC;border-radius:50%;
  animation:cm26Pulse 2.4s ease infinite;flex-shrink:0;
}
@keyframes cm26Pulse{
  0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(125,211,252,.55)}
  50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(125,211,252,0)}
}
.cm26-h1{
  font-family:var(--fs);
  font-size:clamp(36px,4.8vw,60px);
  line-height:1.08;letter-spacing:-.02em;
  color:#fff;margin-bottom:18px;
  animation:cm26Up .8s .1s var(--ez) both;
}
.cm26-h1 em{font-style:italic;color:#7DD3FC}

.cm26-hsub{
  font-size:clamp(15px,1.5vw,17px);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.82);
  line-height:1.75;max-width:540px;
  margin-bottom:32px;
  animation:cm26Up .8s .2s var(--ez) both;
}

.cm26-hbtns{
  display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;
  animation:cm26Up .8s .3s var(--ez) both;
}
.cm26-btnw{
  background:#fff;color:#005BAC;
  padding:13px 28px;border-radius:100px;
  font-size:14px;font-weight:800;
  transition:transform .2s var(--ez),box-shadow .2s;
  box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
}
.cm26-btnw:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 26px rgba(255,255,255,.2)}
.cm26-btnw svg{width:14px;height:14px;stroke:#005BAC;fill:none;stroke-width:2.5}
.cm26-btng{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#fff;
  padding:13px 28px;border-radius:100px;
  font-size:14px;font-weight:700;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.24);
  transition:background .2s,transform .2s;
}
.cm26-btng:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.17);transform:translateY(-2px)}

.cm26-stats{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);
  gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;
  margin-top:34px;
  animation:cm26Up .8s .4s var(--ez) both;
}
.cm26-sb{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);padding:20px 14px;
  text-align:center;transition:background .2s;
  cursor:default;
}
.cm26-sb:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
.cm26-sv{font-size:26px;font-weight:900;color:#fff;line-height:1;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
.cm26-sv span{font-size:18px;color:#7DD3FC;font-weight:800;margin-left:1px}
.cm26-sl{font-size:11.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.58);margin-top:6px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;line-height:1.35}

.cm26-wave{display:block;width:100%;margin-top:50px;position:relative;z-index:2}

@keyframes cm26Up{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(26px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

.cm26-sec{padding:80px 3rem}
.cm26-secw{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto}
.cm26-tag{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  font-size:12px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.1em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#005BAC;margin-bottom:12px;
}
.cm26-tag::before{content:'';width:18px;height:2px;background:#005BAC;border-radius:2px}
.cm26-title{
  font-family:var(--fs);font-size:clamp(28px,3vw,42px);
  color:#0D1826;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:12px;
}
.cm26-sub{font-size:clamp(15px,1.4vw,16px);color:#6B7A94;max-width:580px;line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:44px}

.cm26-gal-sec{
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff 0%,#F5F7FA 100%);
  padding:88px 3rem;position:relative;
}
.cm26-gal-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);
  grid-auto-rows:1fr;
  gap:14px;
}
.cm26-gal-card{
  position:relative;
  aspect-ratio:4/5;
  overflow:hidden;
  border-radius:14px;
  cursor:pointer;
  background:#0D1826;
  box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(13,24,38,.08);
  transition:transform .35s var(--ez),box-shadow .35s;
}
.cm26-gal-card:hover{
  transform:translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow:0 18px 44px rgba(13,24,38,.22);
}
.cm26-gal-card img{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  width:100%;height:100%;
  object-fit:cover;
  transition:transform .6s var(--ez),filter .35s;
  display:block;
}
.cm26-gal-card:hover img{
  transform:scale(1.06);
  filter:brightness(1.04);
}
.cm26-gal-card::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:2;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(0,15,38,0) 35%,rgba(0,15,38,.88) 100%);
  pointer-events:none;
  transition:opacity .3s;
}
.cm26-gal-card:hover::before{opacity:.96}
.cm26-gal-cap{
  position:absolute;left:18px;right:18px;bottom:16px;z-index:3;
  color:#fff;pointer-events:none;
  transform:translateY(4px);
  transition:transform .3s var(--ez);
}
.cm26-gal-card:hover .cm26-gal-cap{transform:translateY(0)}
.cm26-gal-cap-title{
  font-family:var(--fs);font-size:17px;font-weight:700;
  line-height:1.22;letter-spacing:-.01em;
  text-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.45);
}
.cm26-gal-cap-sub{
  font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.78);margin-top:5px;
  letter-spacing:.02em;line-height:1.45;
  text-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
}
.cm26-gal-card-large{
  grid-column:span 2;
  grid-row:span 2;
  aspect-ratio:auto;
}
.cm26-gal-card-large .cm26-gal-cap-title{font-size:22px}

@media(max-width:960px){
  .cm26-gal-sec{padding:56px 1.4rem}
  .cm26-gal-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .cm26-gal-card-large{grid-column:span 2;grid-row:span 1;aspect-ratio:4/3}
}
@media(max-width:640px){
  .cm26-gal-sec{padding:44px 1.2rem}
  .cm26-gal-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:12px}
  .cm26-gal-card-large{aspect-ratio:4/5}
  .cm26-gal-cap-title{font-size:16px}
  .cm26-gal-card-large .cm26-gal-cap-title{font-size:18px}
}

.cm26-vid-sec{
  background:linear-gradient(165deg,#040E1E 0%,#091629 55%,#0D1E38 100%);
  padding:96px 3rem;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.cm26-vid-sec::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;
  top:-140px;right:-140px;width:480px;height:480px;border-radius:50%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,163,224,.08) 0%,transparent 70%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.cm26-vid-sec::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;
  bottom:-180px;left:-100px;width:520px;height:520px;border-radius:50%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,91,172,.07) 0%,transparent 70%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.cm26-vid-w{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;position:relative;z-index:2}
.cm26-vid-head{text-align:center;margin-bottom:44px}
.cm26-vid-tag{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  font-size:13px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.1em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#7DD3FC;margin-bottom:14px;
}
.cm26-vid-tag::before{content:'';width:18px;height:2px;background:#7DD3FC;border-radius:2px}
.cm26-vid-title{
  font-family:var(--fs);font-size:clamp(30px,3.6vw,48px);
  font-weight:700;color:#fff;line-height:1.12;
  letter-spacing:-.02em;margin-bottom:12px;
}
.cm26-vid-sub{
  font-size:clamp(15px,1.4vw,17px);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;
  line-height:1.7;
}

.cm26-vid-frame{
  position:relative;width:100%;
  max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;
  aspect-ratio:16/9;
  border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;
  background:#000;
  box-shadow:
    0 24px 80px rgba(0,163,224,.18),
    0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.5),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06);
}
.cm26-vid-frame iframe{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  width:100%;height:100%;border:0;
  display:block;
}

.cm26-vid-meta{
  margin-top:32px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  gap:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.cm26-vid-mp{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  border-radius:100px;padding:8px 18px;
  font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);
}
.cm26-vid-mp svg{width:15px;height:15px;stroke:#7DD3FC;fill:none;stroke-width:2;flex-shrink:0}
.cm26-vid-mp strong{color:#fff;font-weight:700}

/* Faculty record block */
.cm26-vid-fac{
  margin-top:56px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius:18px;
  padding:32px 36px;
}
.cm26-vid-fac-lbl{
  font-size:12px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.1em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#7DD3FC;margin-bottom:18px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
}
.cm26-vid-fac-lbl::before{content:'';width:18px;height:2px;background:#7DD3FC;border-radius:2px}
.cm26-vid-fac-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;
}
.cm26-vid-fac-card{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius:10px;padding:11px 14px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
  transition:border-color .2s,background .2s,transform .2s var(--ez);
}
.cm26-vid-fac-card:hover{
  border-color:rgba(0,163,224,.35);
  background:rgba(0,163,224,.04);
  transform:translateY(-2px);
}
.cm26-vid-fac-name{
  font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;
  line-height:1.25;
  white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;
}
.cm26-vid-fac-country{
  font-size:11.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);
  font-weight:600;margin-top:2px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;
}
.cm26-vid-fac-role{
  display:inline-block;
  font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#7DD3FC;
  background:rgba(0,163,224,.08);
  border:1px solid rgba(0,163,224,.22);
  border-radius:5px;padding:3px 9px;
  margin-bottom:12px;
}

@media(max-width:960px){
  .cm26-vid-sec{padding:60px 1.4rem}
  .cm26-vid-fac-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .cm26-vid-fac{padding:24px 22px}
}
@media(max-width:640px){
  .cm26-vid-sec{padding:48px 1.2rem}
  .cm26-vid-frame{border-radius:12px}
  .cm26-vid-meta{gap:10px}
  .cm26-vid-mp{font-size:12px;padding:7px 14px}
  .cm26-vid-fac-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}

.cm26-appr-sec{
  background:#F5F7FA;
  padding:88px 3rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.cm26-appr-sec::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;
  top:-100px;right:-100px;width:380px;height:380px;border-radius:50%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,91,172,.06) 0%,transparent 70%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.cm26-appr-w{
  max-width:980px;margin:0 auto;
  position:relative;z-index:2;text-align:center;
}
.cm26-appr-quote-mark{
  font-family:var(--fs);
  font-size:120px;line-height:.5;
  color:#005BAC;opacity:.15;
  margin-bottom:-10px;
  font-style:italic;
  user-select:none;
}
.cm26-appr-quote{
  font-family:var(--fs);
  font-size:clamp(22px,2.6vw,34px);
  font-weight:700;font-style:italic;
  color:#0D1826;line-height:1.32;letter-spacing:-.01em;
  margin-bottom:28px;
}
.cm26-appr-quote em{color:#005BAC;font-style:italic}
.cm26-appr-attr{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;
  padding-top:20px;
  border-top:1px solid #E8ECF2;
  margin-top:8px;
}
.cm26-appr-attr-line{
  width:42px;height:1px;background:#8E9BB0;
}
.cm26-appr-attr-text{
  font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.08em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#5B7FA6;
}

.cm26-appr-pillars{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
  gap:18px;margin-top:56px;
}
.cm26-appr-p{
  background:#fff;border:1px solid #E8ECF2;
  border-radius:14px;padding:24px 22px;
  text-align:left;
  transition:border-color .25s,transform .25s var(--ez),box-shadow .25s;
}
.cm26-appr-p:hover{
  border-color:#C5DCF8;
  transform:translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(0,91,172,.08);
}
.cm26-appr-p-ico{
  width:42px;height:42px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005BAC,#00A3E0);
  border-radius:10px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}
.cm26-appr-p-ico svg{width:20px;height:20px;stroke:#fff;fill:none;stroke-width:2}
.cm26-appr-p-title{
  font-family:var(--fs);font-size:18px;
  font-weight:700;color:#0D1826;
  margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.25;
}
.cm26-appr-p-text{
  font-size:14px;color:#5B7FA6;
  line-height:1.65;
}

@media(max-width:960px){
  .cm26-appr-sec{padding:56px 1.4rem}
  .cm26-appr-pillars{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}
@media(max-width:640px){
  .cm26-appr-sec{padding:44px 1.2rem}
  .cm26-appr-quote-mark{font-size:80px}
}

.cm26-pres-sec{
  background:linear-gradient(165deg,#040E1E 0%,#091629 55%,#0D1E38 100%);
  padding:90px 3rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.cm26-pres-sec::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;
  top:-120px;right:-120px;width:440px;height:440px;border-radius:50%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,163,224,.07) 0%,transparent 70%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.cm26-pres-w{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;position:relative;z-index:2}

.cm26-pres-tag{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  font-size:13px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.1em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#7DD3FC;margin-bottom:12px;
}
.cm26-pres-tag::before{content:'';width:18px;height:2px;background:#7DD3FC;border-radius:2px;display:inline-block}
.cm26-pres-title{
  font-family:var(--fs);font-size:clamp(28px,3.5vw,46px);
  font-weight:700;color:#fff;line-height:1.12;letter-spacing:-.02em;margin-bottom:10px;
}
.cm26-pres-sub{
  font-size:clamp(15px,1.4vw,16px);color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);
  max-width:620px;line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:44px;
}

.cm26-pres-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);
  gap:16px;
}

.cm26-pres-card{
  background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0D1E38 0%,#111E30 100%);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);
  border-left:3px solid var(--pc,#00A3E0);
  border-radius:14px;
  padding:24px 26px 22px;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  transition:transform .3s var(--ez),border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s;
}
.cm26-pres-card::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;right:0;
  width:140px;height:140px;border-radius:50%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,163,224,.05) 0%,transparent 70%);
  transform:translate(40%,-40%);pointer-events:none;
}
.cm26-pres-card:hover{
  transform:translateY(-4px);
  border-color:rgba(0,163,224,.32);
  box-shadow:0 16px 44px rgba(0,0,0,.42);
}
.cm26-pres-chead{
  display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;
  gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px;
}
.cm26-pres-type{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  background:var(--pc-bg,rgba(0,163,224,.1));
  border:1px solid var(--pc-bd,rgba(0,163,224,.26));
  border-radius:100px;padding:4px 12px;
  font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--pc,#00A3E0);
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.cm26-pres-type svg{width:11px;height:11px;stroke:currentColor;fill:none;stroke-width:2.4;flex-shrink:0}
.cm26-pres-when{
  text-align:right;flex-shrink:0;
}
.cm26-pres-date{
  font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;
  font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;line-height:1.2;
}

Nanolute™ Platform

The Technology Behind the Evidence

NANOLUTE technology delivers polymer-free nanocarriers containing sirolimus surrounded by an encapsulation of a proprietary phospholipid carrier — improving lipophilicity and ensuring deep vessel wall penetration.

  • Facilitates better adhesion of Sirolimus on the balloon surface
  • Circumferential coating ensures homogeneous drug delivery
  • Effective drug transfer to the deepest layer of the vessel
  • Better in-tissue bioavailability of Sirolimus
Lower Toxicity, Proven Safety
Stable Coating & Minimal Shedding
Less Embolization
